notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 8.10. It addresses 21 CVEs: CVE-2021-47670, CVE-2022-48919, CVE-2022-49011, CVE-2022-49058, CVE-2022-49111, and 16 more.
notes.title: Description
